title: Raccoon Removal in Bed-Stuy, Brooklyn | $900 – $4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Bedford-Stuyvesant, Brooklyn. Safe, humane extraction from brownstones and multi-family homes. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Raccoons are becoming increasingly common in Bed-Stuy, exploiting the neighborhood's classic brownstones, row houses, and multi-family buildings to nest in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces. These intelligent animals can cause significant structural damage, create health hazards, and keep residents awake with nighttime activity. Best Pest Control NYC provides professional, humane raccoon removal services throughout Bedford-Stuyvesant to safely eliminate infestations and prevent future intrusions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in raccoon removal for Bed-Stuy's unique housing stock, from historic brownstones along Stuyvesant Avenue to newer apartment buildings. Our licensed technicians use humane trapping methods, thorough exclusion techniques, and offer comprehensive cleanup and prevention services to protect your property long-term.
localContext: Bed-Stuy's tree-lined streets and proximity to Herbert Von King Park create ideal raccoon habitats, with wildlife frequently moving between green spaces and residential buildings. The neighborhood's older brownstones and Victorian-era homes often have accessible entry points like damaged roof vents, unsealed chimneys, and gaps in soffits that raccoons exploit for denning sites.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Bed-Stuy?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Bedford-Stuyvesant typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of animals, accessibility of the nesting area, and necessary exclusion work. A single raccoon in an easily accessible attic will cost less than a family of raccoons requiring extensive repairs to a brownstone's roof structure. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Bed-Stuy brownstones?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons frequently target Bed-Stuy's brownstones and historic row houses because these older buildings often have chimneys, attic spaces, and architectural features that provide easy access. Raccoons are excellent climbers and can scale brick facades, use tree branches as bridges to roofs, and squeeze through openings as small as 4 inches to establish dens in warm, dry attics.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal humane and legal in Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, legal methods for raccoon removal in compliance with New York State and NYC wildlife regulations. We use live traps and one-way exclusion doors to safely remove raccoons without harm, and we follow all protocols for handling mothers with babies. Relocated raccoons are handled according to state guidelines, and we never use poisons or inhumane methods.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Bed-Stuy home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day inspections for Bed-Stuy residents and can typically begin trapping within 24-48 hours of your call. The complete removal process usually takes 3-10 days depending on the number of raccoons and their behavior patterns. After removal, we seal all entry points and can provide attic cleanup, insulation replacement, and sanitation services to fully restore your home.
